final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    input enable,
    input load,
    input [3:0] data,
    output reg [3:0] count
);

always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
        count <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (load) begin
        count <= data;
    end else if (enable) begin
        if (count == 4'b1111) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
end

endmodule
